name: flywheel
description: Standardize a compounding development flow from ideation through execution, review, and learning capture.

interface.shortDescription: Compound engineering leverage across the dev loop
interface.longDescription: Guide work through ideation, brainstorming, planning, execution, review, and captured learnings so each completed task makes the next one easier.
defaultPrompt: Use $flywheel to take this task from idea to a working PR through the right Flywheel stage.
Use $fw-brainstorm to refine an idea before planning.
Use $fw-plan to turn this request into an implementation plan.
Use $fw-work to execute the plan through review, shipping, and spin.
